name: runtime-signal-map
title: Runtime Signal Map
description: An infrastructure-flavored background where signal packets move through an application-defined service topology with health + direction: requests enter at ingress nodes, flow along edges between services grouped into regions, and degraded/error paths are marked without color (dashed strokes + slower/stalled flow + a glyph). One canvas + one rAF loop (no per-frame React state, no WebGL). Deterministic first paint, light/dark, reduced-motion-static, forced-colors-safe, offscreen-paused. Clearly-fictional default data.
